title: Green hills and endless skies.
caption: North Yorkshire opened up in long green folds beneath a restless sky.

title: Morning in Knaresborough
caption: A quiet lane before the day properly woke up.

title: Flat white, quiet mind.
caption: The kind of coffee that briefly convinces you the itinerary is under control.

quote: A good traveler has no fixed plans and is not intent on arriving.

title: That time in Croatia
caption: Stone, sunlight, and a city that knows exactly how dramatic it is.

title: JFK → LHR
caption: Eastbound, above the clouds, with optimism packed in the overhead bin.

title: Sunset walk along the River Nidd
caption: The light lingered longer than expected. Nobody complained.

title: Today's wander
caption: A route assembled from good intentions and several wrong turns.

title: Pici Cacio e Pepe
caption: Pasta with the confidence to need very little explanation.

title: Cliffs of Moher
caption: Wind, cliffs, and the Atlantic putting on a show.

title: Lily, always with me.
caption: The best traveling companion never needed a passport.

title: Little pubs. Long conversations.
caption: A village evening with no reason to hurry.
